⚓ General Instructions for Participants
01All participants must carry their valid College ID card, which is mandatory for entry and participation.
02Participants must maintain proper discipline and respectful behavior throughout the event.
03All participants are required to attend the inauguration ceremony, where important announcements will be made.
04Venue details and event instructions will be announced during the inauguration. Follow the schedule accordingly.
05A single registration fee is required per participant, allowing participation in a maximum of three events.
06Participants must report to the respective venues on time for their events.
07Use of inappropriate language, misconduct, or indisciplinary behavior will lead to immediate disqualification.
08Participants must follow the instructions given by event coordinators and organizers at all times.
09Participants are responsible for their personal belongings. Organizers will not be liable for any loss.
10The decision of the judges and organizing committee will be final and binding.
11All participants registered for Online Events are required to attend the Valedictory Event at 2:00 PM on March 11 to know the results.
12In case of any queries, participants are kindly requested to approach the Event Coordinator.
